creator: amongmst@gmail.com
text:
Java 14 released on March 17, 2020, exactly six months after its previous version as per Java's new release cadence. In this tutorial, we'll look at a summary of new and deprecated features of version 14 of the language. We also have more detailed articles on Java 14 that offer an in-depth view of the new features.
https://krunkerio.io
